column1: # - Generated by [proc.dead-save] (D1d) over the real aeon corpus; regenerate:
# - "callee preserves rN" verdict = rN NOT in the callee's VERIFIED effective set
#   (closure: localWrites ∪ callees − verified_preserves), never raw declared text.
# - file:line is the PROC declaration; the dead save is the movem/push near its top.
# - est_cycles only where the 2026-07-16 review named them; "?" = pass-3 measures.
# - class beyond:movem-partial = a movem saves a register PAIR but only ONE half is
#   needed (Collected_FindSlot preserves d0; d1 is the genuine save). Pass-3 can
#   narrow the movem list, not delete it.
# - SOUND direction: false-negative-leaning. A save with ANY clobbering path, an
#   indirect/hole/⊤ callee, or a scratch use is NOT reported. Each entry is a
#   candidate pass-3 verifies before cutting code.
